patch.value:
## Context

The type preset logic is implemented:
- INIT_TYPE_PRESET_NAMES and TYPE_PRESETS (src/cli/commands/init.ts:44, 138+) define 3 presets: agile, ops, research
- Each preset is an array of ItemTypeDefinition entries
- normalizeInitTypePreset validates the preset name
- The actual upsert uses the same upsertItemType + serializeItemTypesFile pattern as pm schema add-type

Adding pm schema apply-preset <name> would:
1. Load the same TYPE_PRESETS[name] array
2. Batch-upsert each definition into schema/types.json (idempotent, same as individual add-type calls)
3. Report registered/replaced counts

SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS would need 'apply-preset' added; the preset definitions should be moved to a shared module (src/core/schema/item-types-file.ts) so both init.ts and schema.ts can import them.

## Acceptance criteria

- pm schema apply-preset agile|ops|research registers the preset types into schema/types.json
- Idempotent: re-running on an already-preset project reports replaced=true but makes no breaking changes
- pm schema list shows the newly registered types as custom entries
- COMMANDS.md schema section updated with example
- Shell completions updated with apply-preset subcommand and agile|ops|research values

## Evidence

- src/cli/commands/init.ts:44 (InitTypePresetName type)
- src/cli/commands/init.ts:135-230 (normalizeInitTypePreset + preset definitions)
- src/cli/commands/schema.ts:42-51 (SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS — no apply-preset)
- docs/COMMANDS.md:410-416 (only documents --type-preset on pm init, not standalone)
pm schema apply-preset <agile|ops|research>: standalone type-preset for already-initialized projects

pm init --type-preset agile|ops|research registers domain-specific item types (Spike, UserStory, etc.), but this option is only available on pm init. Existing projects that want to adopt a type preset must re-run pm init (potentially overwriting settings) or manually batch pm schema add-type calls. A standalone pm schema apply-preset subcommand would let any project adopt the domain vocabulary without re-initialization.
Allow any project to adopt domain vocabulary without re-running pm init

- pm schema apply-preset agile|ops|research registers the preset types into schema/types.json
- Idempotent: re-running on an already-preset project reports replaced=true but makes no breaking changes
- pm schema list shows the newly registered types as custom entries
- COMMANDS.md schema section updated with example
- Shell completions updated with apply-preset subcommand and agile|ops|research values
